name: Ares Acquisition Corp III
business: Ares Acquisition Corp III is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any target. The company's only activities since inception have been organizational activities and those necessary to prepare for this offering.
